key_threats: Arjun Kapoor — top scorer (198 runs, 39.60 avg). Opens aggressively. Must be dismissed inside powerplay.
Deepak Chauhan — best bowler in the league (3.82 econ, 10 wkts). Will bowl in powerplay — attack his first over.
key_weaknesses: Bottom 4 batters struggle with short balls — bowl tight with pace in death overs.
Mohit Verma leaks runs (5.78 econ) — target him in middle overs when he bowls.
No specialist spin option — if pitch turns, we hold the advantage.

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Bowl Ajinkya Pradhan in the powerplay to contain Arjun Kapoor and Ravi Sethi. Use slower balls and off-cutters against Sanjay Nair's middle-order aggression. In death overs, mix yorkers and bouncers — their lower order has exposed weakness against short-pitch bowling.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Pratik Joshi's left-arm angle creates awkward lines for their right-hand dominant middle order. Use Karan Patel as a surprise option to break partnerships — his medium pace catches them off-guard.
